title: Arrow HUD
description: Arrow HUD is a mod that allows you to see the arrow type you are about to load into your crossbow/bow
body:
# Arrow HUD 🏹

Arrow HUD is a Quality of Life mod that shows you what arrow you are loading into your crossbow/bow and also shows the amount of arrows of that sort you have left.

Arrow HUD is highly configurable and has the following features:
Change the position of the icon & text
Change the size of the icon
Change the size of the text
Toggle the text on/off
Reset position to default

**Thanks to rawnet for giving me the idea to toggle txt and change the size of both the icon and text**
